case_title: GOHAR ANNA ABOVYAN VS. JUAN CARLOS REYES

docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-25-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-16-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF GOHAR ANNA ABOVYAN WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JUAN CARLOS REYES WAS PRESENT. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. IF NO APPREARANCES BY PARTIES AT THE OCTOBER HEARING, THE MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED AUG-23-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT REYES, JUAN CARLOS

DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. IF NO APPREARANCES BY PARTIES AT THE OCTOBER HEARING, THE MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,595.00 FILED BY ABOVYAN, GOHAR ANNA AS TO DEFENDANT REYES, JUAN CARLOS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-25-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 9-25-18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
